metadata.task: Determine which spring has a higher spring constant by observing block acceleration.
metadata.description: Work from the Spring Compression Comparison scene state rather than from the title alone. Query accessible object parameters and, when the task involves motion, collisions, forces, or oscillation, step the simulator and compare measured states before submitting the numeric answer.

expected_behavior: The LLM observes the acceleration of blocks when released to infer spring stiffness.
reasoning: A stiffer spring imparts greater force, accelerating the block more rapidly.
